problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Combining Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
